title: Grunwerg Balmoral 24 Piece Boxed Mirror Cutlery Set, 18/10 Stainless Steel, 6 x Table Knives, Table Forks, Dessert Spoons, Teaspoons, Silver
features: ALL YOUR CUTLERY NEEDS: The Balmoral Cutlery set contains 24 deluxe cutlery pieces from Rockingham Forge: 6 x Table Forks, 6 x Table Knives, 6 x Tablespoons, 6 x Teaspoons.
PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS: The set is carefully manufactured from high grade 18/10 stainless steel with a gleaming mirror polished finish.
HASSLE FREE CLEANING: All Balmoral cutlery pieces are 100% dishwasher safe.
SHEFFIELD BASED COMPANY: This 24-piece set was designed by Grunwerg, a family company from the birthplace of stainless-steel cutlery.
description: From the manufacturer Balmoral, a beautifully timeless design Balmoral's handles feature a smooth curve and gently tapered teardrop body, boasting simple elegance and versatility, adding a beautiful touch to your table. All items in this classic collection are made using deluxe 18/10 stainless steel and finished to the highest of standards. Quality cutlery from a brand you can trust Founded in 1945, the award-winning Grunwerg family business produces high-quality household goods and catering products, specializing in high-quality steel. The company is headed by the Grunwerg family, which is located in the steel city of Sheffield. The guaranteed high-quality Grunwerg product range remains the first choice among professionals and renowned chefs in the food industry. A relaxed and calm design Part of our elegant Royal Range Turn your kitchen into a glamorous restaurant with this beautiful stainless steel cutlery set. These beautifully crafted cutlery pieces are sure to impress anyone who sees them. The mirrored finish adds a stylish element that makes this set stand out. Durable and long-lasting, this cutlery set can be used for years to come. The elegant design makes these pieces a great addition to any home or professional environment. A wonderful way to add a luxurious touch to your kitchen. Although hand washing is recommended, this cutlery can easily be cleaned in your dishwasher. Made from the finest quality 18/10 stainless steel making every part of the range rust resistant. You'll receive 12 pieces of your chosen cutlery. Check out the Grunwerg store for our full range of Balmoral cutlery along with all our kitchenware!
